narrative:
Cols 37-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,121 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
